summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cloud Identity Security Dashboard. Backend APIs working with 92.9% success rate (13/14 tests passed). Frontend fully functional with successful login flow, dashboard rendering, theme toggle, and all security sections displaying live data. Minor chart rendering warnings present but not affecting functionality.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthorized requests
minor_bugs.impact: Semantically correct - both indicate auth failure

ui_bugs.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1
ui_bugs.impact: No visual impact, charts render correctly

missing_features.issue: Logout functionality not easily accessible in UI

passed_tests: Dashboard metrics section displays correctly with live data (1,284 users, 156 service accounts)
Threat & anomaly chart renders with 7 days of data
Access hygiene section shows data (34 overprivileged, 67 stale, 8 violations)
Offboarding tracker with 4 recent departures and average revoke time
Credential rotation status with progress percentages and next rotations
Compliance status with 5 CIS benchmarks and audit score
Notification dropdown works and shows 4 notifications (2 unread)
All 12 backend API endpoints return proper data structures
action_item_for_main_agent: Add visible logout button/menu option in dashboard header or user avatar dropdown. Consider fixing recharts width/height console warnings by adding proper container sizing.
success_percentage: Backend: 92.9% (13/14 tests), Frontend: 90% (most features working, minor UI improvements needed)
